decision_schema.agent: string — Maya | Erin | Sales | Compliance | Onboarding | Support | Marketer | Shadow | FamilyDesk
decision_schema.inputs: object — all data available at decision time
decision_schema.owner_decision: string — what owner actually decided (ACCEPT | REJECT | MODIFY | ESCALATE)
decision_schema.modification_notes: string — if owner modified, what changed
decision_schema.outcome: string — what happened after (filled in later)
decision_schema.lesson: string — what should be learned from this
decision_schema.autonomous_eligible: boolean — true when confidence_after > 0.85 on 10+ similar decisions
